# minimal conventions stub for the lessons-skeleton fixture

## 14. Lessons file — per-operator corrections

Layout — one section per agent plus a shared section:

```
## Shared
## PM
## QA
## Dev
## Sweep
## Reflect
## Ops
## Architect
## Signal
```

The canonical skeleton lives in `skills/init/SKILL.md`. The fixture's init
SKILL deliberately omits the `## Signal` section so the lint trips.
